title: EXIT
tmdbOverview: At his mother's 70th birthday party, Yong-nam runs into Eui-joo, who rejected him in college. When the city is engulfed in toxic gas from a terrorist attack, the two must find a way to escape using all the techniques they learned in their college rock climbing club.
synopsis: Released in 2019, EXIT is a action, comedy and k-drama film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
